summary: Cloud Infrastructure and Azure Architecture professional with 16+ years of experience leading enterprise infrastructure modernization, hybrid cloud transformation, operational resiliency, and Azure platform operations. Proven expertise delivering scalable cloud infrastructure, improving operational maturity, strengthening disaster recovery readiness, optimizing cloud costs, and supporting enterprise production environments.

bullets: Deployed Azure HA/DR assessments across enterprise compute, networking, monitoring, identity, and recovery environments.
Validated resiliency readiness using Azure Backup, Site Recovery, Availability Zones, and failover planning strategies.
Reviewed Azure Landing Zone governance, subscription alignment, operational readiness, and cloud maturity standards.
Maintained platform resiliency metrics impacting business continuity, SLA alignment, and stability across production environments.
Utilized infrastructure data to plan remediation initiatives, improving reliability and operational standards for platform teams.
Deployed enterprise infrastructure operations across development, staging, and production Azure workload environments.
Managed and mentored cloud engineering teams, improving operational consistency, quality, and delivery performance.
Utilized Azure Monitor and Grafana observability solutions, reducing mean-time-to-resolution by approximately 40%.
Provisioned incident response, escalation handling, and operational governance standards across Azure environments.
Maintained architecture readiness reviews, cloud optimization initiatives, and infrastructure stability through performance improvements.
Maintained secure Azure infrastructure environments supporting enterprise workload availability and operational stability.
Deployed Azure networking controls including subnet segmentation, routing, and access governance.
Provisioned Azure Backup policies and testing to support business continuity and recovery requirements.
Utilized compliance teams to align governance, firewall controls, and infrastructure security standards.
Maintained infrastructure documentation and runbooks improving support readiness and operational consistency.
Deployed Azure infrastructure support, monitoring, and operational optimization for enterprise customer environments.
Maintained hybrid migration planning and Azure subscription optimization initiatives across infrastructure workloads.
Utilized technical enablement activities for onboarding cloud engineering resources.
Provisioned monitoring enhancements and infrastructure performance optimization initiatives improving operational reliability.
Deployed hybrid Azure migration initiatives across compute, storage, networking, and identity platforms.
Provisioned Azure Landing Zones supporting governance, security, resiliency, and subscription management.
Utilized RBAC, MFA, Azure Policy, and identity federation controls improving governance and security.
Maintained disaster recovery readiness using Azure Site Recovery, achieving near-zero downtime recovery objectives.
Provisioned workload optimization initiatives, reducing Azure infrastructure costs by approximately 20%.
Deployed hybrid cloud modernization initiatives supporting healthcare infrastructure resiliency and operational improvements.
Provisioned backup automation and disaster recovery processes supporting business continuity requirements.
Utilized Azure hybrid migration, reducing on-premises infrastructure downtime by approximately 50%.
Maintained healthcare-compliant infrastructure operations aligned with data protection and operational continuity standards.
Maintained Windows Server, Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, and disaster recovery infrastructure operations.
Supported server deployments, Active Directory administration, endpoint security, and enterprise infrastructure operations.
Delivered onsite technical support, infrastructure deployment, incident resolution, and SLA-driven operational support.

projects.title: Enterprise Azure Migration & Governance
projects.description: Led hybrid cloud modernization initiatives improving governance, resiliency, monitoring, and operational scalability.

projects.title: Operational Resiliency & Infrastructure Reliability
projects.description: Improved incident response effectiveness through monitoring modernization and operational governance enhancements.

projects.title: Cloud Cost Optimization & Operational Maturity
projects.description: Reduced infrastructure costs through workload optimization, governance alignment, and resource management initiatives.

education: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Chandigarh University - Expected Completion: 2027

certifications.name: Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert (AZ-305)

improvement_notes: Improved leadership positioning for management and senior cloud infrastructure opportunities.
Strengthened enterprise cloud governance and resiliency visibility across Azure roles.
Reduced low-value support-heavy wording improving executive readability.
Improved ATS alignment for Azure infrastructure and cloud operations leadership roles.
Maintained complete career continuity while compressing older operational roles.
audience_alignment_notes: Resume optimized for Senior Cloud Architect, Cloud Operations Manager, Infrastructure Engineering Manager, Azure Platform Lead, and Director-track infrastructure leadership opportunities.
why_this_job: Strong alignment with enterprise Azure infrastructure, cloud transformation, governance, resiliency, operational leadership, and hybrid cloud modernization requirements.
rejection_reasons: Limited Kubernetes and containerization production experience.
Limited advanced DevOps and CI/CD pipeline implementation exposure.
Terraform experience currently foundational compared to advanced IaC-focused candidates.

star_stories.bullet: Implemented Azure Monitor and Grafana observability solutions reducing MTTR by approximately 40%.
star_stories.situation: Cloud operations teams faced delayed incident resolution across enterprise Azure environments.
star_stories.task: Improve monitoring visibility and accelerate operational response timelines.
star_stories.action: Implemented centralized observability using Azure Monitor and Grafana across infrastructure workloads.
star_stories.result: Reduced MTTR approximately 40% improving operational visibility and service reliability.

star_stories.bullet: Reduced on-premises downtime approximately 50% through phased Azure hybrid migration initiatives.
star_stories.situation: Healthcare infrastructure experienced operational downtime and infrastructure scalability limitations.
star_stories.task: Improve resiliency and operational continuity through hybrid cloud modernization.
star_stories.action: Supported phased Azure migration, backup modernization, and disaster recovery process improvements.
star_stories.result: Reduced downtime approximately 50% improving business continuity and infrastructure reliability.

star_stories.bullet: Provisioned Azure Landing Zones supporting governance, security, resiliency, and subscription management.
star_stories.situation: Rapidly growing cloud footprint led to fragmented governance and security vulnerabilities at Casepoint LLC.
star_stories.task: Establish a scalable, secure, and standardized environment for enterprise workloads.
star_stories.action: Architected and delivered Azure Landing Zones using Management Groups and Azure Policy; standardized networking with Hub-and-Spoke topology.
star_stories.result: Reduced workload onboarding time by 60% while ensuring 100% compliance with security governance frameworks.

star_stories.bullet: Maintained disaster recovery readiness using Azure Site Recovery, achieving near-zero downtime recovery objectives.
star_stories.situation: Critical Tier-1 legal technology applications lacked a validated, rapid-recovery Disaster Recovery strategy.
star_stories.task: Engineer a robust HA/DR framework capable of meeting strict RTO/RPO requirements.
star_stories.action: Implemented and automated failover orchestration using Azure Site Recovery (ASR) across multiple regions.
star_stories.result: Achieved DR readiness with < 15 minute RTO and near-zero RPO, significantly exceeding business resilience requirements.

star_stories.bullet: Provisioned workload optimization initiatives, reducing Azure infrastructure costs by approximately 20%.
star_stories.situation: Azure cloud consumption was exceeding budget forecasts due to over-provisioned resources and unmanaged sprawl.
star_stories.task: Optimize resource utilization to reduce monthly spend without impacting application performance.
star_stories.action: Led right-sizing exercises, implemented Azure Reservations, and optimized storage tiers across the enterprise subscription.
star_stories.result: Reduced annual Azure infrastructure costs by 20% ($[X]k savings) while maintaining consistent service performance.

flags.message: Critical gap for FAANG: Lack of production Kubernetes (AKS/EKS) and heavy-weight orchestration experience.
flags.fix: Highlight any PoC or learning related to K8s; emphasize Terraform 'Scale' vs just 'Usage'.

flags.message: Impact metrics are good, but 'Organization-Wide' scale needs better quantification for FAANG levels.
flags.fix: Quantify by number of users, subscriptions (e.g., 50+ subscriptions), or total TB/PB of managed data.

flags.message: Resume leans too heavily on 'Operations' vs 'Engineering' (Infra-as-Code).
flags.fix: Frame migration tasks as 'Automated Migrations' using Terraform/Python rather than just 'Deployment'.

trajectory.description: Strong candidate for Azure-heavy enterprises; needs 'Engineering' tilt for top-tier tech firms.
trajectory.recommendation: Shift focus from 'Maintaining' to 'Building Scalable Platforms'. Highlight complex problem-solving specifically in distributed Azure networking.
